expertAssessments.rationale: Production AI sidebar starter and direct prompt paths both received real AI responses and passed dashboard-count parity assertions.
The targeted Playwright MCP pass exercised guest login, dashboard navigation, sidebar chat, tool menu, and response assertions against Vercel production.
Vercel deployment inspection, /api/health, and usage checks were green for the tested production target.
The AI response assertions were tied to the dashboard status-count snapshot rather than free-form text alone.

completedImprovements.title: AI assistant Playwright MCP real chat QA on Vercel v8.11.36
completedImprovements.evidence: Production Playwright MCP verified guest PIN login, dashboard render/performance, AI sidebar starter prompt, direct prompt, tool menu, console cleanliness, and dashboard-count parity. CLI guard also passed 2/2.

notes: Guest PIN value was sourced from local environment and not recorded.
